_doc: Triaged npm-audit advisories. Every entry needs a reason and an expiry; scripts/audit-gate.mjs fails the build for any high+ advisory NOT listed here, and for any listed entry past its expiry — so triage decisions cannot rot silently.

allow.reason: All target the self-hosted Next.js SERVER runtime (image optimizer, middleware/proxy, RSC handling, WebSocket upgrades). This app deploys as a static export (output: 'export') served by nginx/caddy — no Next server runs in production; the dev server is local-only. Real fix is the next@16 major upgrade, tracked in plan.md (Tier 1, security pass follow-up).
